title: ilex latifolia
intro: Ilex latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, Aquifoliaceae, native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Ilex latifolia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of consuming Ilex latifolia tea or supplements include improving digestion, boosting the immune system, and reducing oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Ilex latifolia include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
